name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Peanut butter, chunky or smooth
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine peanut butter and melted butter; stir until well blended.
3. Mix in sugar, eggs, and vanilla.
4. Combine flour with baking powder and baking soda.
5. Add the dry mixture to the peanut butter mixture along with milk and chocolate chips. Stir just until combined.
6. Spoon batter into 12 paper-lined muffin cups (2 1/2- to 3-inch).
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until muffins spring back when lightly touched in center. Serve warm or at room temperature.
